_doc:
Werewolf tribe registry. Each entry is the lore + display data for a tribe; the matching mechanical effects (frenzy modifiers, flee bonuses, etc.) live as `tribe_*` entries in traits.json. The two files are intentionally separate so tribe flavor can be edited without touching the mechanic encoding — the exact split vampire_clans.json uses.

At the First Change, the awaken flow grants the matching `tribe_*` trait. An empty tribe at awakening produces a tribeless cub (the thinblood analog) who can claim a tribe later via quest or admin.

get_of_fenris.description: The Fenrir. War is the only prayer they trust. Strongest in battle, first into it, and the last tribe you want angry at you — including at themselves.
get_of_fenris.bane: Rage runs hot — the frenzy threshold is lower than for other Garou.

children_of_gaia.description: The peacemakers, as far as a werewolf can be one. They believe the war can be ended without becoming the thing they fight.
children_of_gaia.bane: None to speak of — their calm is the boon: frenzy finds little purchase.

silent_striders.description: The wanderers, exiled from their ancient homeland. They carry messages between septs, walk where others fear, and never stay.
silent_striders.bane: No den, no rest — but no trap holds them either: they slip away from any fight they choose to leave.
